name: Edge Of Endless
short_description: In a boundless desert, one finds oneself lost, compelled to continue onwards. Discover where they are headed. Along this journey, you'll uncover the story of (you), and see where their tale concludes. Hopefully
detailed_description:
In a boundless desert, one finds oneself lost, compelled to continue onwards. Discover where they are headed. Along this journey, you'll uncover the story of (you), and see where their tale concludes. Hopefully

Do you ever have trouble focusing on tasks like working, cleaning, homework, studying, etc?

Edge Of Endless is the hottest new focus timer idle game hybrid to play while you do other things

Recharge the battery, start the vehicle. Keep moving forward until the battery runs out, then recharge it again until the next checkpoint.

I am continuing to develop the game and plan to do so for approximately 2 more years. Feel free to suggest any content you'd like to see added to the game.

supported_languages: English, Turkish, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Spanish - Latin America, Russian, Traditional Chinese
